name: Krystal Biotech, Inc.
business: Krystal Biotech is a fully integrated, global, commercial-stage biotechnology company focused on the discovery, development, manufacturing and commercialization of genetic medicines to treat diseases with high unmet medical needs. Its first commercial product, VYJUVEK, is approved for the treatment of dystrophic epidermolysis bullosa (DEB). The company also has a pipeline of product candidates for rare and serious diseases and aesthetic conditions.

exposures.sentence: We are a fully integrated, global, commercial-stage biotechnology company focused on the discovery, development, manufacturing and commercialization of genetic medicines to treat diseases with high unmet medical needs.
We are also evaluating the potential of our platform to address aesthetic conditions via our wholly-owned subsidiary Jeune Aesthetics, Inc.

catalysts.event: Complete enrollment in IOLITE Phase 3 study for KB803
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete enrollment in IOLITE in the first half of 2026 and report top-line results later in 2026.

catalysts.event: Start enrollment in CORAL-3 registrational study for KB407
catalysts.sentence: We expect to align on the CORAL-3 study design with the FDA and start enrollment in the potentially registrational CORAL-3 study in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Report interim safety and SERPINA1 delivery data from repeat dose Cohort 2B of SERPENTINE-1 for KB408
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report interim safety and SERPINA1 transgene delivery data from the repeat dose cohort of SERPENTINE-1 in 2026.

catalysts.event: Report top-line data from EMERALD-1 Phase 1/2 study for KB801
catalysts.sentence: Enrollment is ongoing, and we expect to report top-line data in 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate registrational study for KB111 for Hailey-Hailey disease
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete development and validation of the scale in the first half of 2026 and initiate a registrational study evaluating KB111 for the treatment of HHD in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Report interim efficacy data and potential registrational study plans for inhaled KB707 in combination with chemotherapy
catalysts.sentence: Enrollment in this cohort is ongoing, and we expect to report interim efficacy data and potential registrational study plans in 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 2 study for KB304 for wrinkles of the décolleté
catalysts.sentence: We now expect to initiate the Phase 2 study in 2027.

tamClaims.claim: Over 3,000 DEB patients in the United States and over 9,000 worldwide
tamClaims.sentence: We believe that there are, at present, over 3,000 DEB patients in the United States and over 9,000 worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: Close to 40,000 children and adults living with CF in the United States, and an estimated 105,000 diagnosed across 94 countries
tamClaims.sentence: The CFF estimates that there are close to 40,000 children and adults living with CF in the United States, and an estimated 105,000 people diagnosed with CF across 94 countries.

tamClaims.claim: Over 60,000 patients in the United States and over 250,000 patients globally suffering from severe AATD
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that there are over 60,000 patients in the United States and over 250,000 patients globally suffering from severe AATD.

tamClaims.claim: Estimated 68,000 patients in the United States had a NK claim in 2024
tamClaims.sentence: Based on available claims data, an estimated 68,000 patients in the United States had a NK claim in 2024, up over 115% from 31,000 patients with a NK claim in 2020.

tamClaims.claim: Over 750 patients in the United States and over 2,000 worldwide affected by ocular complications of DEB
tamClaims.sentence: Correspondingly, we believe there are over 750 patients in the United States and over 2,000 worldwide that are affected.

tamClaims.claim: Prevalence of Hailey-Hailey disease roughly 1 per 50,000
tamClaims.sentence: The prevalence of HHD is not well characterized and is most commonly estimated at roughly 1 per 50,000, although underreporting is possible.
